findings.description: context() callers unwrapped from (GraphNode, float) tuples to plain GraphNode list. callers_with_confidence() preserved as separate public method for consumers needing confidence scores.
parent_classes combines EXTENDS+IMPLEMENTS outgoing; child_classes combines EXTENDS+IMPLEMENTS incoming. Matches CLI formatter iteration pattern exactly.

evidence: __init__.py: context() returns 7-key dict with node, callers, callees, importers, imports, parent_classes, child_classes.
__init__.py: callers unwrapped via list comprehension [n for n, _conf in ...]. Clean, readable.
__init__.py: Uses existing RelType.IMPORTS/EXTENDS/IMPLEMENTS with storage.get_related_nodes() — no new storage methods needed.
__init__.py: callers_with_confidence() still available at line 264 for consumers needing confidence scores.
storage.py: get_reverse_dependency_files() uses parameterized Cypher. remove_edges_from_file() reuses MATCH pattern.
heritage.py: class_index.get() resolves all class-like types (CLASS, INTERFACE, TYPE_ALIAS, ENUM). Removed unused imports.
workflow_memory.py: graph.index() added before graph.flows() — matches auto-index pattern of other graph commands.
__init__.py: review_impact() includes 'label' key — prevents KeyError in CLI formatter.
